title: Python Developer
description: Looking for a Python Developer proficient in Django and FastAPI. Experience with PostgreSQL and Docker is required. Knowledge of microservices architecture is a plus.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Expert in React, Node.js, and TypeScript. Must be able to build responsive UI and scalable REST APIs. Familiarity with AWS and Git is mandatory.

title: ML Engineer
description: Building machine learning models using TensorFlow and PyTorch. Experience with Scikit-learn and Pandas for data processing. Deep learning background is preferred.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyzing complex datasets using Python and SQL. Expert in data visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn. Ability to generate business insights.

title: Backend Developer
description: High-performance backend development with Go and Redis. Scalable microservices using Kafka and Kubernetes. Passion for system design.

title: Frontend Developer
description: React and Redux specialist. Skilled in HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap. Experience with accessible web design and performance optimization.

title: React Developer
description: Building finance dashboards with React and Tailwind CSS. Solid understanding of JavaScript and API integration. Work with TypeScript is preferred.

title: Django Developer
description: Building trading platforms with Django and Python. Expertise in SQL optimization and real-time data handling. Experience with Redis is a plus.

title: AI Engineer
description: Implementing NLP solutions with spaCy and Transformers. Experience with LangChain and OpenAI APIs. Building AI-driven educational tools.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Managing cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Expert in Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions. Focus on site reliability.

title: Data Scientist
description: Statistical modeling and advanced data science using Python. Experience with Scikit-learn and NumPy. Solving payment fraud with AI.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Developing chatbot systems with NLP. Expertise in spaCy, NLTK, and HuggingFace models. Understanding of vector databases like FAISS.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Building image recognition systems for logistics. Expert in OpenCV and TensorFlow. Experience with Deep Learning is mandatory.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: GCP and Azure architecture. Managing scalable databases and serverless functions. High focus on security and VPC configurations.

title: QA Engineer
description: Automated testing with Selenium and Python. Bug tracking with Jira. Knowledge of performance testing tools is an advantage.

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridging business needs and technical solutions. Expert in SQL, Excel, and dashboarding with Tableau. Strong communication skills.

title: Product Manager
description: Product roadmap design using Figma and Jira. Experience with Agile methodologies. Understanding of user experience and e-commerce.

title: Android Developer
description: Kotlin expert building high-end Android apps. Skilled in MVVM architecture and Retrofit. Passion for clean UI patterns.

title: iOS Developer
description: Swift and SwiftUI professional. Experience with iOS SDK and CI/CD for mobile. Building fast investment tools.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protecting e-commerce infrastructure. Expert in network security, ethical hacking, and vulnerability assessments. Knowledge of firewalls.
